value.rationale: The page describes subagents — specialized AI assistants defined in advance via Markdown files with YAML frontmatter, the /agents command, or CLI flags. These are pre-defined, statically configured agents loaded at session start (or via CLI for a session). The claim is about "Dynamic agent configuration created at query time based on runtime conditions." The page does not describe agents being dynamically configured at query time based on runtime conditions; configurations are authored ahead of time (in files, plugins, managed settings, or as JSON passed at launch). There is no mention of runtime/query-time generation of agent configuration based on runtime conditions, so the specific claimed offering is not substantiated.
